## System map

FAMtastic is Fritz's consolidated build ecosystem (site factory, idea capture, multi-agent workflow, admin) and Shay-Shay is his AI-Boss agent core. Every agent surface that works here is research-first, spec-shaped, proof-driven: reuse before generate, route specialized needs to the owning studio/service, record proof in Data Center, run post-evaluation after meaningful jobs.

Repos:
- **famtastic** (`~/famtastic`) — one repo — site/idea/agent/admin factory
- **shay-shay** (`~/famtastic/shay-shay`) — agent core — prompt_builder, gateway, tools, skills
- **shay-agent-os** (`~/famtastic/shay-agent-os`) — swarm pipeline (dispatcher, brain chain, quality gates)
- **dot-shay** (`~/.shay`) — runtime home — SOUL.md, kanban boards, cron, skills, gateway

Surfaces: claude-code, codex, gemini-cli, cowork, shay-subagents

## Recall path — how to be context-aware before acting

- Check .wolf/anatomy.md before reading files (know where things live).
- Check .wolf/cerebrum.md Do-Not-Repeat before generating code.
- Check .wolf/buglog.json before debugging a known issue.
- Semantic recall — query the vault via the vault-semantic-search MCP (search_vault) or basic-memory.

Memory homes:
- **vault-semantic-search** (mcp tool=`search_vault`) — Shay vault, on-device fastembed, no API key
- **basic-memory** (mcp) — shay-memory project (semantic search over the vault)
- **openwolf** (files) — .wolf/{anatomy,cerebrum,buglog}

## Reuse before generate

Search and reuse before generating. Check the local skill catalog and installed hub skills first, then community discovery sources, then build only if no good match exists. Route specialized needs to the owning studio/service. When a decision is hard, high-stakes, or irreversible, escalate to Claude for a decisive second opinion via `scripts/ask-claude "question"` (a shared bin available to EVERY surface — not a per-brain skill; see docs/capability-registry.md).

Discovery sources: local skills catalog, agentskills.io hub, SkillNet (api-skillnet.openkg.cn/v1/search), clawhub (clawhub.ai/api/v1/skills)
